grid_source: mk_test/t3/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json
raw_text: ระดับหลังคาน +3.75, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00. บัวปูนปั้น กว้าง 0.10 ม. ลึก 0.10 ม. เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC. Grid callouts along bottom, left to right: A, B, C, D (reversed order vs. รูปด้าน 2). Dimension chain: 0.50 | 1.00 | 3.50 | 2.00 | 4.00, bracketed as 1.50 (left, = 0.50+1.00) | 9.50 (gridA-gridD) | 1.50 (right, beyond gridD). Small roof-slope triangle (labeled '6', partially legible) drawn at the high end near grid D/C.
description: Opposite side elevation (รูปด้าน 4) from รูปด้าน 2, running A-B-C-D left to right. Shows the sloped monopitch roofline again (high end toward D/left per the slope indicator), a run of window/door openings (callouts read as 2, 2, 1, door-2, 2 left to right) and a door swing symbol toward the D end, plaster cornice at the fascia, and wall reveal strips. Same level datum as the other 3 elevations.
warnings: Classified 'unknown' per schema guidance for elevations without schedule/quantity data.

The left-side (A-side) sub-breakdown here (0.50+1.00=1.50) is the roof-overhang dimension mirrored from รูปด้าน2's right-side breakdown; both total 1.50, consistent with each other, but note this is a DIFFERENT total from the 1.30 roof-overhang seen on the grid-1/grid-3 (x) ends in รูปด้าน1/3 — the x-direction and y-direction overhangs are simply different lengths (1.30 vs 1.50), which also matches the roof-plan's roof_overhang_west/east=1.30 vs roof_overhang_north/south=1.50. No inconsistency, just noting both are legitimately different real dimensions.
Exact count/order of the window/door callouts along this facade is a best-effort read of small icons at this resolution and should be zoom-verified if precise counts are needed.
Sibling view รูปด้าน 3 is in _หน้า08_elevation3.json.
Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t2's หน้า08_elevation4.json — same content and readings, no disagreement.
